title: Board Meeting Prep — Meridian Healthcare Q2 2026

lines: client-context.md              ← Meridian Healthcare profile
current-it-budget-2025.xlsx
hipaa-audit-findings.pdf
clinical-nlp-pilot-report.docx
assess-2026-03-13/    ← previous maturity assessment
strategy-2026-03-13/  ← previous AI strategy sprint
Starting Board Meeting Prep playbook...
Reading context/client-context.md → Meridian Healthcare
Reading deliverables/strategy-2026-03-13/ → prior strategy outputs
Reading deliverables/assess-2026-03-13/ → maturity scores
Activating 5 agents: CDO → Exec Comms → Analyst → Chief of Staff → QA
I see previous strategy and assessment deliverables in your project.
I'll build on those. One question:
Has the board seen the maturity assessment, or is this
their first exposure to the AI program status?
User: First exposure. They asked the CEO for "an AI update" — we need to
set the baseline and make the investment ask.
Good — a baseline-setting board pack. I'll frame it as
"here's where we are, here's the opportunity, here's the ask."
Step 1: Strategic Framing (CDO)
Setting board narrative from prior strategy + assessment...
Narrative: "From Reactive to Predictive Healthcare"
Key message 1: AI maturity at 2.2/5.0 — below healthcare average (2.8)
Key message 2: $9.2M base-case return on $4.1M investment (2.2x NPV)
Key message 3: Clinical NLP quick win: $1.2M annual savings
Ask: Approve $4.1M 3-year AI investment (Phase 1: $1.2M this fiscal year)
Step 2: Data & Benchmarks (Data Analyst)
Pulling Meridian KPIs and healthcare peer comparisons...
Meridian vs Healthcare Leaders:
AI spend / revenue: 0.03% (leaders: 0.8%) 26x gap
Models in production: 2 (leaders: 15+) Behind
Data team / headcount: 0.6% (leaders: 1.4%) Below avg
POC-to-prod cycle: 8 mo (leaders: 6 wk) Behind
Governance maturity: 1.6/5 (leaders: 4.2/5) Critical
Step 3: Deck Production (Exec Comms Lead)
Building board presentation using SCR format, McKinsey chart standards...
Slide 1:  Executive Summary — Situation, Complication, Resolution
Slide 2:  Maturity Baseline — 6 dimensions vs healthcare peers
Slide 3:  The Opportunity — 12 scored use cases, top 5 highlighted
Slide 4:  Quick Win: Clinical NLP — $1.2M impact, 6-week timeline
Slide 5:  Investment Ask — 3-scenario model, base case $4.1M/3yr
Slide 6:  Architecture & Roadmap — 3 phases, HIPAA-compliant
Slide 7:  Risk & Governance — EU AI Act readiness plan
Slide 8:  Next Steps & Timeline — Q2 milestones + board cadence
Step 4: Operational Readiness (Chief of Staff)
Preparing briefing materials and anticipated board questions...
✓ Board pre-read: 2-page executive brief (sent 5 days before)
✓ Anticipated Q&A: 12 questions with prepared responses, including:
— "Why should we invest in AI when our margins are under pressure?"
— "What happens if the EU AI Act penalties apply to our diagnostics?"
— "How do we know the $9.2M return estimate isn't inflated?"
✓ Backup slides: 5 appendix slides for deep-dive requests
✓ Talking points: CDO speaking notes per slide
Step 5: Quality Gate (Quality Reviewer)
✓ Pyramid principle: All slides lead with insight, not data
✓ Financial claims: Cross-referenced to investment-case.xlsx
✓ Maturity scores: Match assess-2026-03-13/maturity-scorecard.xlsx
✓ Regulatory claims: HIPAA + EU AI Act references verified
✓ Board-appropriate: No jargon, all abbreviations defined
Board pack approved. Ready for distribution.
Board prep complete. 6 deliverables saved:
board-presentation.pptx 8-slide deck (Meridian-specific)
executive-brief.md 2-page pre-read for board members
kpi-scorecard.xlsx Maturity + peer benchmarks
qa-responses.md 12 anticipated board questions + answers
talking-points.md CDO speaking notes per slide
appendix-slides.pptx 5 backup deep-dive slides
